## What

One sentence: what does this PR change?

## Why

Link to the issue or RFC this implements. If none exists, explain the motivation.

## How to verify

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/unit/ adapters/*/tests/`
- [ ] Ruff clean: `ruff check src/ adapters/*/src/`
- [ ] mypy clean: `mypy --strict src/wake/`
- [ ] Manual verification: <describe>

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (in scope)
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Spec change (requires RFC issue first)

## Checklist

- [ ] DCO sign-off on all commits (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No new dependencies without explanation
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
